text:
Continuous improvement placeholder #1: add higher-signal evals/CI and observability

补齐 CI/evals 接入与 OpenTelemetry TODO 的可执行落盘计划（不影响本地运行，默认关闭远端写）。

Acceptance:
- 存在可执行的 evals/CI 入口与文档
- 不引入 secrets 入库风险

Workstream: governance

Implement task ship (close -> gates -> commit -> push; mark BLOCKED on push failure)

实现 `./teamos task ship <TASK_ID>`：强制 close→secrets/purity/tests→commit→push；push 失败则将任务标记 BLOCKED 并记录原因。

Evidence:
- missing: .team-os/scripts/pipelines/task_ship.py

Acceptance:
- 新增 pipeline: .team-os/scripts/pipelines/task_ship.py
- CLI: ./teamos task ship 可用并可 dry-run

Workstream: governance

Add WORKSPACE_RUNBOOK.md (repo/workspace boundary, init/migrate/doctor)

补齐 Workspace 运行手册：初始化/迁移/校验（repo purity）、常见故障与恢复；明确 project 真相源只能落在 Workspace（repo 外）。

Evidence:
- missing: docs/WORKSPACE_RUNBOOK.md

Acceptance:
- 新增 docs/WORKSPACE_RUNBOOK.md
- runbook 覆盖 workspace init/migrate/doctor 的可执行命令

Workstream: devops

Add evals coverage for self_improve_daemon (scheduler/dedupe/leader-only)

补齐 evals：覆盖 self-improve daemon 的最小行为（>=3 proposals、state 更新、leader-only 写入拦截、debounce/dedupe）。

Evidence:
- missing: evals/test_self_improve_daemon.py

Acceptance:
- 新增 evals/test_self_improve_daemon.py（离线、决定性）
- CI/本地可运行并稳定通过
